text: Welcome back to Fort Ward for the second half — the goals are flying in, so let's crack on!
Soren hits it up to Walter, who takes it and drops back...
...and slides it across to Brody, outside the box...
Brody shoots — and it's in the back of the net! What a finish!
Abel — robbed by Victor!
Victor finds Klody.
Klody drives up the pitch...
...looks to pass, but shoots — and scores! Klody!
And is the Frenchman injured?! We'll never know — but he looks thoroughly sorry for himself!
Marcos rolls it out to Quentin.
Quentin carries it infield...
Brody nicks it — but Quentin shoves him to the floor! Play on, says no referee ever, ha!
And it's in! Quentin fires it home — a goal that should never have happened!
Thomas hoofs clear — Milton blocks!
Klody, back to Milton...
Milton to Walter — who walks it into an empty net! No defence in sight!
Quentin out left to Abel...
...Victor intercepts!
Punted up to Ian...
Ian into Brody, surging forward...
...out to Walter...
It's there! Brody slots it home — a lovely return from Walter!
Shane finds Marcos...
Marcos plays it forward for orange — but Brody intercepts, and feeds Milton.
Quentin out left, looks for Shane...
It's in! Shane scuffs it past Nirun — a messy goal, but they all count!
Ricky drives forward — dispossessed by Edwin!
Edwin to Tomasz, whipped in...
Ian heads clear, Edwin shoots — blocked again, and it drops to Blake, the cowardly defector!
It's in! Quentin lashes home a half-volley — still miserable, les misérables, mon frère!
Klody's hemmed in — Marcos tackles...
...Marcos out to Quentin.
Quentin skips past Klody...
...out right to Tomasz.
Milton intercepts — clears it up to Walter!
Walter runs onto it, shoots — and scores!
Shane plays out from the back to Evan...
Evan to Tomasz and back...
...switched to Quentin, on the left.
Quentin crosses for Shane — headed clear...
...Tomasz's header finds Quentin...
Shane heads it home — GOAL!
Orange on the back foot, Quentin on it...
...across his own box to Evan...
Evan to Tom, and back to Blake...
Blake up — Victor nods it on!
Klody infield to Brody, and back...
...Klody shoots — and it's in! Goal!
Marcos and Walter tangle — Walter wins it, but Blake, the traitor in orange, hacks him down!
Blake gifts it to Brody, out to Walter...
...Walter shoots — and blazes it WIDE! He really should've buried that!
Tomasz, out from the back to Evan...
...Evan up to Edwin...
...Edwin back to Evan...
Evan crosses to Shane...
And he's MISSED it! Quentin, point-blank — how on earth?!
Abel wrestles Victor — out to Thomas, who drives to Shane and back to Tom...
Tom crosses into the box...
...cleared to Evan, hoofed back in...
...Edwin rises — and heads it WIDE! He really should've scored!
Marcos out from the back to Thomas...
...Thomas up to Abel on the left...
Abel back to Quentin, and out to Shane...
...Shane infield to Abel...
Abel turns, shoots — finds the net, GOAL!
Ian on it — and not on orange, mind!
Tackled by Blake — Soren hoofs it up...
Milton out to Victor, on the right...
Victor crosses — to Brody and Klody, left...
Brody inside to Klody, and back...
...Brody shoots — and SCORES, to end the game! Victor's distraught — but what a game. Legends, the lot of them!
